$comment: Admin-editable category tree. This file is the interim source of truth until the Postgres `categories` table is live (db/migrations/001_init.sql) — the shape mirrors that table exactly so the migration is a straight copy, not a rewrite. `formMapping` maps the normaliser's detected product form onto a category so imported stock lands in the right place automatically.

categories.name: Faceted Gemstones
categories.description: Cut and polished stones ready for setting. Every stone is cut in our own workshop from rough we sourced ourselves, and every listing is a single piece.
categories.seoTitle: Faceted Gemstones for Sale — Natural Cut Stones
categories.seoDescription: Natural faceted gemstones cut in our Peshawar workshop — emerald, ruby, sapphire, peridot and more. Treatment disclosed on every listing. Free worldwide shipping over $500.

categories.name: Cabochons
categories.description: Domed and polished rather than faceted, cut to show body colour and any internal character such as silk or chatoyancy.
categories.seoDescription: Natural cabochon gemstones polished to show body colour and internal character. Hand-cut in Pakistan, one of a kind, treatment disclosed.

categories.name: Raw Gemstones
categories.description: Natural crystals sold in their grown form — uncut, unpolished, and collected for the crystal habit rather than for cutting.
categories.seoDescription: Raw natural gemstone crystals in their grown form, uncut and unpolished. Direct from Pakistani and Thai sources for collectors and crystal practitioners.

categories.name: Rough Gemstones
categories.description: Cutting material sold by weight or by the parcel, graded for yield. For lapidaries and cutters who want to work the stone themselves.
categories.seoTitle: Rough Gemstones for Cutting — Lapidary Rough
categories.seoDescription: Gem rough graded for cutting yield, sold by weight and by the parcel. Emerald, tourmaline, topaz and more, direct from the source in Pakistan.

categories.name: Jewellery
categories.description: Hand-fabricated sterling silver and 21K gold, made in our workshop around individual stones. No two pieces are identical.
categories.seoDescription: Handmade gemstone rings, pendants and necklaces in sterling silver and 21K gold. Each piece built around a single natural stone in our Peshawar workshop.

categories.name: Specimens
categories.description: Mineral specimens presented as found, on matrix. Valued for crystal form, termination quality and how they display rather than for facetable clarity.
categories.seoTitle: Mineral Specimens — Natural Crystal Matrix Pieces
categories.seoDescription: Collector mineral specimens on natural matrix from Swat Valley and beyond. Emerald, ruby, quartz and tourmaline crystals with undamaged terminations.

categories.name: Wholesale Parcels
categories.description: Sorted lots priced by the parcel, matched for tone so a designer can build a collection from one batch. Trade pricing.
categories.seoTitle: Wholesale Gemstone Parcels — Bulk Lots for Designers
categories.seoDescription: Wholesale gemstone parcels sorted and tone-matched for jewellery designers and dealers. Buy gemstones in bulk direct from the source.
